task_completion.description: Modify the Jitsi Meet configuration file to remove the shared video feature.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor (e.g., nano, vim) or terminal command modifying 'config.js' (located at /home/ga/.jitsi-meet-cfg/web/config.js). The agent must remove the 'sharedvideo' string from the 'toolbarButtons' array.

task_completion.description: Restart the Jitsi web container to apply the configuration changes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a terminal executing a command like 'docker restart jitsi-web-1', 'docker-compose restart web', or restarting the entire docker-compose stack in the /home/ga/jitsi directory.

task_completion.description: Access the Jitsi Meet instance and join a meeting room.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a web browser navigated to http://localhost:8080. The screen should show that the agent has entered a Jitsi meeting room (active meeting interface with a bottom toolbar).

task_completion.description: Open the 'More actions' menu in the Jitsi meeting interface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'More actions' menu (typically represented by a three-dots icon on the bottom toolbar) being clicked, resulting in an open popup menu panel on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Share a YouTube video' feature is removed and keep the menu open for the final state.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Examine the open 'More actions' menu in the final screenshot. The option 'Share a YouTube video' (or 'Share video') must NOT be present in the list of actions. The menu must be visibly open in the final state.

integrity.description: Verify the agent modified the actual configuration file and restarted the service, rather than just hiding the button using browser Developer Tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check the trajectory for terminal interactions editing /home/ga/.jitsi-meet-cfg/web/config.js and restarting the docker container. The absence of the button should be a result of a backend config change, not frontend CSS/HTML manipulation via DevTools.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used a real web browser to check the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: A standard web browser (like Chromium or Firefox) should be visible displaying the Jitsi Meet interface, rather than a text-based browser or a script output.

integrity.description: Verify the 'More actions' menu is genuinely open in the final state without being obscured.
integrity.visual_evidence: The final screenshot must clearly show the 'More actions' menu actively open in the browser, not covered by terminal windows or other applications.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The Jitsi Meet instance is deployed via Docker Compose at /home/ga/jitsi. The configuration file to modify is located at /home/ga/.jitsi-meet-cfg/web/config.js on the host. To globally disable the 'Share a YouTube video' feature, the string 'sharedvideo' must be removed from the 'toolbarButtons' array in this config file. After modifying the file, the web container (named 'jitsi-web-1') must be restarted using Docker to apply the changes. The final verification requires joining a meeting at http://localhost:8080 and opening the 'More actions' menu (three dots icon) to confirm the 'Share video' option is absent.
